flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 79% at University of Puerto Rico-Utuado vs the 2003–2007 baseline (310 vs 1.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Puerto Rico-Utuado fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 (68.2% → 46.3%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Puerto Rico-Utuado rose 296% between 2021 and 2024 (5.5% → 21.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Puerto Rico-Utuado fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
